items.name: TRIGGER2MARKER
items.description: Interactive tool to decode 8-bit trigger codes to markers for actiCHamp amplifiers. Simulates Digital Port Settings behavior.

items.name: Tone Generator
items.description: Generate sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle wave tones with adjustable frequency, volume, and pulse mode for auditory testing.

items.name: Screen Flicker
items.description: Generate adjustable screen flicker stimuli at configurable frequencies with custom foreground/background colors.

items.name: USB Battery Pack Tests
items.description: Low-power load retention test results for USB battery packs used in portable EEG setups.
